findings.problem: The chapter's central discovery is delivered through a run of unusually tidy, self-explanatory thought fragments, so Anya's telepathy functions like clean exposition instead of overloaded signal-hunting. Because the chapter-defining turn depends on those packets, Damian's reversal from suspect to counter-operator reads as handed to her rather than uncovered under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the clue chain at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:59, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:69, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:121, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:143, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:159 so the useful thoughts stay fragmentary, stressed, and character-shaped rather than briefing-clean. Make Anya's conclusion depend on her combining those fragments with at least one external cue already on the page, such as the observational beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:61, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:151, instead of receiving another perfectly legible mental summary.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised discovery material around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:121, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:143, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:159, a cold reader can still explain why Anya singles out Damian but cannot point to any single thought that cleanly states the conspiracy map or Damian's role. FAIL if the revised passage still lets one or two thought fragments do the full investigative work by themselves.

findings.problem: Once the chapter understands Damian is trying to stop the conspiracy, it keeps translating the same conclusion into new abstract phrasing. The suspect-to-counter-operator reversal lands at least three times before the scene advances, which blunts the turn and spends page weight re-proving what the reader already knows.
findings.rewrite_direction: Choose one decisive reversal beat among snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:131, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:161, then cut or convert the others so the following material at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:165 moves immediately into fresh stakes: the report she will falsify, the consent violation, and the childhood-recognition danger.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:131 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:167 contains one explicit suspect-to-counter-operator reversal and every paragraph after that explicit turn adds a new consequence rather than another abstract paraphrase of 'he's trying to stop this.' FAIL if the revised passage still restates the same interpretive conclusion in multiple narrator verdicts before moving on.

findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly uses article-stripped, subjectless narration as an all-purpose emphasis device. That clipped scaffolding is widespread enough to read as autopilot rather than intentional pressure, and it directly violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the clipped narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:61, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:131, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:139, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:161 into grammatically complete narration or clearly attributed inner speech. Keep the brevity and pressure, but restore function words and vary the sentence shapes instead of dropping into bare shards whenever the scene wants emphasis.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised material around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:61, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:131, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:139, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:161 no longer depends on bare stand-alone shards like location labels, adjective piles, or subjectless verdicts unless they are explicitly rendered as Anya's inner speech. FAIL if the revised narration still reads like clipped prose shorthand rather than full narration.

findings.problem: Damian's near-recognition flares because the chapter needs to plant the ticking clock, not because the scene gives him a convincing on-page trigger. The quartet shift by itself is too generic for a memory sequence carrying this much structural weight, so the setup feels mechanically placed rather than organically dislodged.
findings.rewrite_direction: Plant a concrete sensory or visual trigger into the approach or terrace material before the memory cascade, then make the recognition run at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:171, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:175, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:191 respond to that trigger. Local options: give Damian a specific glimpse, sound, posture, or other present-tense cue in the material around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:151 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:169, then let the memory follow from that cue instead of from generic wavering concentration.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reader can point to an explicit on-page trigger in the revised scene before snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:171 that plausibly knocks loose Damian's memory of Anya before the 'An.' fragment. FAIL if the memory still appears with no clear precipitating cue beyond vague distraction, music in general, or authorial timing.

summary: FAIL overall. The chapter lands the required state change, but the core discovery is still too hand-delivered: telepathy becomes clean plot exposition, the Damian reversal is paraphrased after it lands, clipped narration turns into a pervasive prose tic, and Damian's near-recognition arrives without a convincing local trigger.
